programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two seasoned adventurers recruited by a seemingly psychic woman with a treasure map go on an adventure to recover a horde of gold belonging to an ancient being called the Firewalker

programme.title: Godzilla Vs Mechagodzilla II
programme.desc: The United Nations assembles the ultimate weapon to defeat Godzilla while scientists discover a fresh pteranodon egg on a remote Japanese island

programme.title: Adventures of the Wilderness Family
programme.desc: The Robinson family decide to leave city life behind for one of clean living in the wilderness for the sake of their daughters health There they learn the value of family as they become closer to nature

programme.desc: Americans come West to California in the hope of peaceful settlement

programme.title: Rim of the Canyon
programme.desc: ene Autrys stolen horse turns up in a ghost town where Gene goes after he is left stranded during a stagecoach race

programme.title: Distant Drums

programme.title: Broadway to Cheyenne
programme.desc: A cowboy detective goes up against a gang of big-city thugs trying to set up a protection racket out west

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A succession of murders lead Nick and Schanke to suspect the villain is hunting the citys most dangerous criminals for sport

programme.desc: A record store clerk with psychotic tendencies is granted unspeakable powers by a magical pendant which he abuses to fulfill his dream of meeting a beautiful rock star

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A young football star begins to have nightmares about a serial killer called The Springwood Chopper after finding his last victim Each dream reveals more of the killer until he is blamed for the killings Now his girlfriend begins to experience the same dreamswho is the killer

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An Agatha Christie-style mystery sees the inhabitants of a remote hotel terrorized by rumors of a werewolf prowling the area Not to fear as a self-appointed werewolf hunter is amongst them But might he have a dark secret of his own

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A bitter elderly woman learns that her husband and a laid-back couple are hiding a youth potion from her while camping in the wilderness

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A model desperate for fame hooks up with a crazed fashion photographer

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Overbearing control freak Jeremy and his long-suffering wife Julie are a squabbling young rich couple who encounter unexpected trouble in the form of a scruffy biker and his pregnant girlfriend while embarking on a road trip to Sunnyvale Can a surprise journey through time enable the obsessive Jeremy to successfully avert a tragic disaster

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick goes undercover and joins a cult to investigate the death of a city officials son

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur hires a bumbling handyman to fix up the house in anticipation of a visit from Home Beautiful Magazine and Ed wants new shoes

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan wants to get a peek at the documents that a visiting general has

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan convinces Kommandant Klink that the heavy water being stored at Stalag 13 is a youth potion

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: A 3-Sister Singing Act is stranded on a deserted island and McHale and The 73 Crew have an ulterior motive when they volunteer for the rescue mission But the girls having had such experiences in the past are wise to their plan

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: While out on a recon mission McHale and the 73 Crew discover a deserted plantation which they turn into a party house where they can enjoy themselves when not on duty But their activities draw the attention of both the US Navy and the Japanese

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomers conned into signing a contract for dancing lessons

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter must decide whether or not to re-enlist

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Everyone becomes suspicious of Gilligan when they discover that hes been keeping a diary and they respond by creating their own written accounts of how they saved Gilligan from the Japanese soldier

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The professor makes a dye marker to help get rescued The Skipper plans to join the Navy when they get home but he finds out he must lose weight to meet their requirements--and Gilligan finds out that he must gain weight too

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: George drives into a ditch on the McCoys property breaking their water pipe in the process Grampa claims he posted a warning sign but George claims there was no sign A lawsuit ensues

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa manages Georges campaign for town councilman

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS tries to blackmail the world when they get an atomic bomb

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS threatens the USA to dry up its entire water supply CONTROL is temporarily taken over by its original chief Admiral Hardgrade

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: All of BJs greatest adversaries are assembled in Las Vegas for a Sheriffs Convention when a criminal gang stages an ambitious and inventive robbery of the Dunes Casino Caught near incriminating evidence BJ is the prime suspect Part I of a three-part epic that continued on The Misadventures of Sheriff Lobo

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed wins 100 in Wilburs name when he correctly answers a contest question over the telephone Wilbur now has a chance to win 5000 but hes going to need Eds help

programme.title: Thunderbolt and Lightfoot
programme.desc: Thunderbolt a veteran bank robber teams up with Lightfoot a young thief who saves him from a tough situation for a new and daring heist with his old gang

programme.title: The Retriever
programme.desc: A martial artist Max Thayer flees with an ex-agents manuscript and sister Shawn Hoskins while on a mission for the CIA

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget protects Fang the Wonderdog from MAD who wants to kidnap Fang and make millions in ransom

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Claws henchman tries to take Gadgets watch

programme.title: Revenge of the Ninja
programme.desc: A Japanese gallery owner denies his violent ninja heritage until American drug traffickers kidnap his young son

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When Arcane hires mercenaries to kill Swamp Thing the injured creature uses Anne Fisks equipment to try to heal himself temporarily becoming human again Tressa discovers his secret and tries to help him

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The latest extra-terrestials to be rescued by the Moon Alpha Base crew are Pasc and his young son Etrec They are from the usually peaceful planet of Archaron and they claim that they are victims of a rebellion engineered by Pascs wife Lyra However Helena discovers that they have both been infected with a virus which makes them considerably less friendly and more deadly than their initial claim

programme.title: The Return
programme.desc: In New Mexico an alien spacecraft abducts two young children and an old man 25 years later the children are returned as adults to the same town now beset by strange cattle mutilations

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Hazzard Jail is the meeting place for Black Jack Bender and a group of syndicate kingpins who are conspiring to smuggle illegal weapons in the area Bo and Luke - with a little help from Uncle Jesse Daisy and their friends Cletus and Cooter - use some good ol southern smarts to keep the mobsters at bay until the FBI can arrive to investigate

programme.title: Hercules 108
programme.desc: Hercules 108

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Sandoval has a mole attempting to gain information about Liam - particularly concerning his commitment to the Taelons When a Taelon and protector are killed in a portal that malfunctions Liam is suspicious that it was intentional

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Blackwood Project investigates individuals who claim to have had close encounters The team stumbles onto an alien plot involving implanting something into victims bodies for the study of the human immune system setting them free and collecting them later to learn the results Harrison ends up dating one of the victims Karen McKinney

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A wealthy hunter stalks and wounds a rare hawk for a trophy Afterward the swamp takes Will into its confidence and Will sees the swamp as he never has before

programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Dr Kimble is arrested after a fight breaks out when the fishing boat he works on returns to a heated dockworkers strike

programme.title: Big Valley

programme.desc: An abusive step father is murdered The boys mother attempts to blame a neighborhood kid The abused boy knows the truth but is afraid that he he will incriminate someone close to him no matter what he tells the police

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: A cocky sleazy and horny late night talk radio host brings in a sexy female guest who claims the aliens gave her the solution to evil in the world - a monster that eats bad people who agree to it He laughs it off at first

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon have less than two hours to find the dog that bit a little girl five days earlier Normally treatment consists of serum injections followed by vaccine inoculations but in this case the girl is highly allergic to the anti-rabies serum and it could kill her

programme.title: The Octagon
programme.desc: A martial artist must defeat a plan by ninjas to create a worldwide training camp for terrorists

programme.title: Wavelength
programme.desc: Two young lovers learn that a small group of child-like space aliens are marooned on Earth and are being held prisoner at a top secret military facility The couple then decide to liberate the extraterrestrial castaways and help them make a rendezvous with a rescue ship sent from the alien home planet

programme.title: Gamera Vs Barugon War Of The Monsters
programme.desc: After a treacherous expedition to retrieve a giant opal disaster strikes as the opal reveals itself to be an egg which spawns Barugon demon dog from Hell! Armed with a deadly tongue and cold beams Barugon wreaks havoc on Japan Gamera comes to save the day

programme.title: Highlander II The Quickening
programme.desc: In this sci-fifantasy sequel Connor MacLeod Christopher Lambert has become an elderly man after losing his immortality Living in a bleak future where the world is protected from solar radiation by a massive shield MacLeod regains his youth when he kills two assassins from his home planet This results in an ongoing battle with the villainous and powerful Gen Katana Michael Ironside but MacLeod receives help when the noble Juan Ramirez Sean Connery returns

programme.title: The Perfect Weapon
programme.desc: An expert in kenpo karate avenges his Koreatown friend slain by a mobster in Los Angeles

programme.title: Deep Space
programme.desc: A spaceship with a hideous monster with an incredible appetite for flesh crashes to Earth Unsuspecting policemen Ian Mclemore and Jerry Merris investigate the wreckage They discover several small pods which they remove

programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two seasoned adventurers recruited by a seemingly psychic woman with a treasure map go on an adventure to recover a horde of gold belonging to an ancient being called the Firewalker

programme.title: Tiger Warsaw
programme.desc: Chuck brought sorrow to his family when he shot his father who is now a semi-invalid After 15 years of self destruction he returns home to seek forgiveness

programme.title: Cannonball
programme.desc: Racing across the country from LA to New York a plethora of exotic cars carry contestants hoping to win a very large sum

programme.title: The Perfect Weapon
programme.desc: An expert in kenpo karate avenges his Koreatown friend slain by a mobster in Los Angeles

programme.title: A Day in October
programme.desc: This story based on fact is about the movement of Danish Jews out of Denmark to neutral Sweden in the 1940s It focuses on a single family and tells of their involvement with the underground and of their own initially reluctant participation in sabotaging a munitions plant and of the daughters affection for one of the movements leaders

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.title: Demons
programme.desc: A group of random people are invited to a screening of a mysterious movie only to find themselves trapped in the theater with ravenous demons

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Dawn of the Dead
programme.desc: During an escalating zombie epidemic two Philadelphia SWAT team members a traffic reporter and his TV executive girlfriend seek refuge in a secluded shopping mall

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Abdallah Ibrahim v. Kevin Walker

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Milos Vukovic v. Igor De Castaneda.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: The DC Glenn Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who created a 90s anthem that set the trend for Hip Hop Music today

programme.title: The April Taylor Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the lady whose upcoming celebrity tell all book will blow your mind Meet the lovely Ms April Taylor

programme.title: The Cynda Williams Interview
programme.desc: Meet the lady who became a star in the 1990s hit movie Mo Betta Blues Hear how selling herself out to become rich was and still isnt an option

programme.title: The Chico Brown Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: From being the Co-defendant to Rick Ross to becoming a successful film maker Chico Brown stops by the show to set the record straight

programme.title: The Sean Kanan Interview
programme.desc: Sherard sits down with Cobra Kai star Sean Kanan aka Mr Mike Barnes Learn how the success of Karate Kid 3 and Cobra Kai still amazes him

programme.title: The Jaxx Kellerman Interview
programme.desc: Meet this young lady who writes and performs with a real chip on her shoulder Jaxx Kellerman on the Sherard Show

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Count Gruemon steals Kevins Power Pad and Zapper in Hyrule Kevin and Link head out to the world of Puss n Boots to retrieve the stolen items

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget protects Fang the Wonderdog from MAD who wants to kidnap Fang and make millions in ransom

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Claws henchman tries to take Gadgets watch

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegades beam the Guardians into a parallel universe where the unwitting Leader-1 and Scooter fight evil Guardians and ally with the good Cy-Kill Crasher and Cop-Tur

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Steamer defects to the Guardians but theyre suspicious when he reveals Cy-Kills new scheme to overthrow Earth

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: A tussle with a comet hurls the Pride and crew twenty-five years back in time to Jayces home planet They search and find Audric when he was a student Jayce tells him he is his son and after much hesitation Audric almost believes him

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss and Monster Minds are blocking sunlight to a planet making it too cold for that planets defensive humruns large bugs to be capable of fighting and eating the Monster Mind vines Jayce and Oon are imprisoned by the native people

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Out in the New Orleans Bayou Jacques Lancaster has been using sap from the fire trees as a powerful but volatile fuel Miles Mayhem wants to use it to power VENOMs vehicles

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: During the ceremony of Matt Trakkers honorary knighthood two yeoman warders are suddenly attacked by ravens Vanessa Warfield has been training them to be used in a crown jewel heist

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever
